prompt: Create a premium conceptual packaging design for [Product Name], a [Product Type] by [Brand Name]. Build the idea around one strong product truth: [Product Truth], and one human truth: [Human Truth]. Turn that into one instantly understandable packaging concept expressed through the packaging itself — using structure, transparent windows, illustration, die-cuts, folds, shape, or product interaction. The result should feel clever, simple, shelf-stopping, emotionally appealing, and realistically manufacturable. Use [Packaging Type] format, [Color Palette], [Style Direction], clean typography, strong hierarchy, realistic materials, and high-end commercial product-render quality. Avoid clutter, generic decoration, confusing mechanisms, and overdesigned luxury. Show the final pack as a clean hero product shot on a simple background.
